{{Quote|Your Alliance friends make great ''use'' of the asteroid corridor in breaking the ''blockade...'' It's almost ''impossible'' for the massive Imperial cruisers to ''patrol'' here.|Baron Orman Tagge|<ref name="SW33">[[Star Wars (1977) 33|''Star Wars'' (1977) 33]]</ref>}}
The '''Feswe Corridor''' was an uninhabited [[Star system/Legends|star system]], located in the [[Gordian Reach/Legends|Gordian Reach]] [[Sector/Legends|sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].

==Description==
The Corridor was full of closely-packed [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroids]], which made navigation difficult. It was named after [[Feswe]], the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Scout/Legends|scout]] who blazed a [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] from [[Ladarra]] to the Corridor.<ref name="TEA" />

==History==
[[File:FalconAttacksExecutor-CSW.png|thumb|left|200px|The [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] attacks the [[Executor/Legends|''Executor'']] in the Feswe Corridor.]]
The Rebels used the Corridor to smuggle supplies from [[Feriae Junction/Legends|Feriae Junction]] to [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]], avoiding the [[Yavin blockade|Imperial blockade]] of the [[Gordian Reach/Legends|Gordian Reach]]. [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperials]] set up two [[conductor tower]]s in the Corridor in an [[Battle of the Corridor|attempt]] to freeze a [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Rebel fleet]] of [[DP20 gunship/Legends|Corellian gunships]] with the [[Omega Frost/Legends|Omega Frost]], but one of the towers was deactivated by [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] before it could harm the fleet.<ref name="TEA" /><ref name="SW33" /><ref name="SW34">[[Star Wars (1977) 34|''Star Wars'' (1977) 34]]</ref>

The [[Executor/Legends|''Executor'']] was later [[Skirmish in the Feswe Corridor|damaged]] in the Corridor by the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] after its [[Deflector shield/Legends|shields]] were disabled with a [[Power gem]].<ref name="TEA" /><ref name="DM">"[[Doom Mission]]"</ref>
